summary: Escape API-sourced values in Pexels attribution HTML sidecars.
reason: Sidecar attribution_html interpolated photographer names and Pexels URLs directly into HTML text and href attributes. Escaping the API-sourced strings prevents malformed or injectable markup in generated .meta.json sidecars.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1; go build ./...; git diff --check
